recap:
- Minimize embedding dimensionality to improve query speed; choose the lowest dimension that maintains retrieval quality.
- Keep the number of results per query moderate (10-100) to reduce scanning time and latency.
- Select the appropriate endpoint SKU (Standard vs. Storage-Optimized) based on vector count, dimensions, and performance needs.
- Utilize filters and metadata to narrow search results and enhance relevance and performance.
- Prefer Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) retrieval for speed; use hybrid search only when keyword relevance is essential.
